intent: Redesign the review UX — summary view with inline code diffs, clean minimal theme, remove clutter

changed.summary: Complete rewrite — summary-first layout with expandable node cards containing inline diffs, new minimal theme
changed.before: Graph-first layout with side panel, neon dark theme, 'Intent satisfied' badge
structural_changes: added: renderSummaryView with expandable node cards
added: CSS variables for clean theme system
modified: graph initialization deferred until tab click

decision_trace.rationale: Reviewers need to understand the narrative before spatial relationships. The graph is a drill-down, not the starting point.

decision_trace.decision: Inline code diffs inside expandable cards rather than a separate panel
alternatives: Keep the side panel for code
decision_trace.rationale: Code is part of the change story — it belongs inline with the context, not disconnected in a sidebar.

decision_trace.decision: CSS variables for theming instead of hardcoded colors
decision_trace.rationale: Makes future theme changes trivial (light mode, custom themes). Single source of truth for the color system.
